description: An aerodynamicist needs to deploy the high-lift configuration of the regional transport baseline model for a takeoff CFD analysis. Read the takeoff schedule provided on the Desktop (takeoff_schedule.txt). Open the baseline model located at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/transport_baseline.vsp3. For the main wing and horizontal tail components, set the specified sub-surface deflections (FlapInboard, FlapOutboard, Slat, Elevator) to their target angles. Save the deflected model as transport_takeoff.vsp3 in the OpenVSP directory, and export the outer mold line geometry as an STL mesh to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/takeoff_mesh.stl.
